name: ARC Prize 2026 - ARC-AGI-3 Competition
snippet:
ARC Prize 2026 ARC-AGI-3 winners will be determined by participants' agent performance across the ARC-AGI-3 game environments. Grand Prize (100%) - $700K.
Awarded to the first eligible agent that scores 100% on the ARC-AGI-3 evaluation. If not won, the Grand Prize will continue during the next annual competition.
